HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

Go to the documentation of this file.

5
6#include "PlaneWave.h"
7#include <iostream>
8
14PlaneWave::PlaneWave(dcmplx wvl, double eps, rvec dir, cvec po) {
15 layeredUtils = nullptr; // No layered media utilities for this constructor
16 dir /= sqrt(dot(dir, dir));
17 k = (2 * PI * sqrt(eps) / wvl) * dir;
18 z = Z0 / sqrt(eps);
19 p = po;
20}
21
27PlaneWave::PlaneWave(std::vector<dcmplx> k_L, std::vector<dcmplx> epsL,
28 std::vector<dcmplx> muL, std::vector<double> zValsInterfaces,
29 std::vector<double> thickness, rvec propDir, cvec po) {
30 layeredUtils = new LayeredMediaUtils(k_L, epsL, muL, zValsInterfaces, thickness);
31 propDir /= sqrt(dot(propDir, propDir));
32 dir = propDir;
33 z = 1.0;
34 if (dir[2] > 0.0) {
35 // Propagation in the positive z-direction
36 k = k_L[0] * dir;
37 zL = Z0 * sqrt(muL[0] / epsL[0]);
38 incLayerZ = zValsInterfaces[0];
39 incLayerIndex = 0;
40 } else {
41 // Propagation in the negative z-direction
42 k = k_L.back() * dir;
43 zL = Z0 * sqrt(muL.back() / epsL.back());
44 incLayerZ = zValsInterfaces.back();
45 incLayerIndex = zValsInterfaces.size();
46 }
47 p = po;
48 krho = sqrt(k[0] * k[0] + k[1] * k[1]);
49#ifdef DEBUG
50 std::string filename = "pos_inc.txt";
51 std::vector<rvec> points = this->layeredUtils->readPositionsFromFile(filename);
52 writeEHData(points, "E_data.csv", "H_data.csv");
53 for (int i = 0; i < points.size(); ++i) {
54 std::vector<cvec> EandH = EvaluateLayeredEandH(points[i]);
55 std::cout << "E" << i << " at point " << points[i] << ": " << EandH[0] << std::endl;
56 std::cout << "H" << i << " at point " << points[i] << ": " << EandH[1] << std::endl;
57 }
58#endif
59}
60
64cvec PlaneWave::EvaluateE(rvec r) { return p * exp(I * dot(k, r)); }
65
74std::vector<cvec> PlaneWave::EvaluateLayeredEandH(rvec r) {
75 bool normalInc = std::abs(dir[2]) == 1.0;
76 cvec te(dcmplx(0.0, 0.0), dcmplx(0.0, 0.0), dcmplx(0.0, 0.0));
77 cvec tm(dcmplx(0.0, 0.0), dcmplx(0.0, 0.0), dcmplx(0.0, 0.0));
78 cvec Einc(dcmplx(0.0, 0.0), dcmplx(0.0, 0.0), dcmplx(0.0, 0.0));
79 cvec Hinc(dcmplx(0.0, 0.0), dcmplx(0.0, 0.0), dcmplx(0.0, 0.0));
80
81 // Build TE/TM basis
82 if (normalInc) {
83 te = p / sqrt(dot(p, p));
84 tm = cross(te, rvec2cvec(dir));
85 } else {
86 rvec temp = cross(dir, rvec(0.0, 0.0, 1.0));
87 temp = temp / sqrt(dot(temp, temp));
88 te = rvec2cvec(temp);
89 tm = cross(te, rvec2cvec(dir));
90 }
91
92 // Incident amplitudes at the incidence interface
93 std::map<std::string, dcmplx> amplitude;
94 amplitude["TE"] = dot(te, p) * exp(I * k[2] * incLayerZ);
95 amplitude["TM"] = dot(tm, p) * exp(I * k[2] * incLayerZ) / zL;
96
97 // Observation layer and secondary coefficients
98 int obsLayerIndex = this->layeredUtils->GetLayerIndex(r);
99 std::map<std::string, blitz::Array<dcmplx, 2>> secondary;
100 secondary.emplace("TE", this->layeredUtils->Secondary(krho, obsLayerIndex, incLayerIndex, "TE"));
101 secondary.emplace("TM", this->layeredUtils->Secondary(krho, obsLayerIndex, incLayerIndex, "TM"));
102
103 // Longitudinal component in the observation layer
104 dcmplx kZ = this->layeredUtils->getkL(obsLayerIndex);
105 kZ = this->complexSqrt(kZ * kZ - krho * krho);
106
107 // Assemble E and H from secondary waves
108 std::array<std::string,2> polarizations = { "TE", "TM" };
109 cvec E(dcmplx(0.0, 0.0), dcmplx(0.0, 0.0), dcmplx(0.0, 0.0));
110 cvec H(dcmplx(0.0, 0.0), dcmplx(0.0, 0.0), dcmplx(0.0, 0.0));
111
112 // Sum contributions for TE and TM
113 for (const auto& name : polarizations) {
114 auto sec = secondary[name];
115 for (int i = 0; i < sec.extent(0); ++i) {
116 double dir1 = (i == 0 && obsLayerIndex != 0) ? 1.0 : -1.0;
117 double zeta = (i == 0 && obsLayerIndex != 0)
118 ? (r[2] - this->layeredUtils->getZValInterface(obsLayerIndex - 1))
119 : (this->layeredUtils->getZValInterface(obsLayerIndex) - r[2]);
120 dcmplx xpar = k[0] * r[0] + k[1] * r[1] + kZ * zeta;
121 cvec dirNew(k[0] / this->layeredUtils->getkL(obsLayerIndex),
122 k[1] / this->layeredUtils->getkL(obsLayerIndex),
123 dir1 * kZ / this->layeredUtils->getkL(obsLayerIndex));
124 if (name == "TE") {
125 E = te * amplitude[name] * sec(i, 0) * exp(I * xpar);
126 H = cross(dirNew, E) / ( Z0 * sqrt( this->layeredUtils->getMu(obsLayerIndex) /
127 this->layeredUtils->getEps(obsLayerIndex) ) );
128 } else if (name == "TM") {
129 H = amplitude[name] * sec(i, 0) * exp(I * xpar) * cross(dir, p);
130 E = -cross(dirNew, H) * ( Z0 * sqrt( this->layeredUtils->getMu(obsLayerIndex) /
131 this->layeredUtils->getEps(obsLayerIndex) ) );
132 }
133 Einc += E; Hinc += H;
134 }
135 }
136
137 // Add direct incident field when observation == incidence layer
138 if (obsLayerIndex == incLayerIndex) {
139 Einc += this->EvaluateE(r);
140 Hinc += this->EvaluateH(r) /
141 ( Z0 * sqrt( this->layeredUtils->getMu(obsLayerIndex) /
142 this->layeredUtils->getEps(obsLayerIndex) ) );
143 }
144 return {Einc, Hinc};
145}
146
150cvec PlaneWave::EvaluateH(rvec r) {
151 cvec prop(k);
152 prop /= sqrt(dot(prop, prop));
153 cvec hp(cross(prop, p));
154 return hp * exp(I * dot(k, r)) / z;
155}
156
160dcmplx PlaneWave::IntegrateE(RWGFun* f) {
161 dcmplx out;
162 cvec (PlaneWave::*EvaluationFunction)(rvec r);
163 EvaluationFunction = &PlaneWave::EvaluateE;
164 out = gauss.Integrate(this, EvaluationFunction, f);
165 return out;
166}
167
168
172dcmplx PlaneWave::IntegrateH(RWGFun* f) {
173 dcmplx out;
174 cvec (PlaneWave::*EvaluationFunction)(rvec r);
175 EvaluationFunction = &PlaneWave::EvaluateH;
176 out = gauss.Integrate(this, EvaluationFunction, f);
177 return out;
178}
179
184std::vector<dcmplx> PlaneWave::IntegrateLayeredEandH(RWGFun* f) {
185 std::vector<dcmplx> out;
186 std::vector<cvec> (PlaneWave::*EvaluationFunction)(rvec r);
187 EvaluationFunction = &PlaneWave::EvaluateLayeredEandH;
188 out = gauss.Integrate(this, EvaluationFunction, f, NeedsAccurate);
189 return out;
190}
191
192// Get the wavevector \f$\mathbf{k}\f$.
193cvec PlaneWave::Wavevector() { return k; }
194
195// @brief Get the polarization vector \f$\mathbf{p}\f$.
196cvec PlaneWave::Polarization() { return p; }
197
201void PlaneWave::setGrnFunLayered(GreenF* /*fGrnFields*/, std::vector<Grid> /*tabGrids*/) {
202 throw std::runtime_error("PlaneWave does not support layered Green's functions.");
203}
204
211void PlaneWave::writeEHData(
212 const std::vector<rvec>& points,
213 const std::string& eFilename,
214 const std::string& hFilename)
215{
216 // 1) open output streams
217 std::ofstream eFile(eFilename);
218 std::ofstream hFile(hFilename);
219 if (!eFile.is_open() || !hFile.is_open()) {
220 throw std::runtime_error("Failed to open E/H output files");
221 }
222
223 // 2) write CSV headers
224 eFile << "x,y,z,Ex_re,Ex_im,Ey_re,Ey_im,Ez_re,Ez_im\n";
225 hFile << "x,y,z,Hx_re,Hx_im,Hy_re,Hy_im,Hz_re,Hz_im\n";
226
227 // 3) loop over points
228 for (size_t i = 0; i < points.size(); ++i) {
229 const auto& pt = points[i];
230 auto fields = EvaluateLayeredEandH(pt);
231 const cvec& E = fields[0];
232 const cvec& H = fields[1];
233
234 // write E line
235 eFile
236 << pt[0] << ',' << pt[1] << ',' << pt[2] << ','
237 << std::real(E[0]) << ',' << std::imag(E[0]) << ','
238 << std::real(E[1]) << ',' << std::imag(E[1]) << ','
239 << std::real(E[2]) << ',' << std::imag(E[2]) << '\n';
240
241 // write H line
242 hFile
243 << pt[0] << ',' << pt[1] << ',' << pt[2] << ','
244 << std::real(H[0]) << ',' << std::imag(H[0]) << ','
245 << std::real(H[1]) << ',' << std::imag(H[1]) << ','
246 << std::real(H[2]) << ',' << std::imag(H[2]) << '\n';
247 }
248
249 // 4) close files
250 eFile.close();
251 hFile.close();
252}
PlaneWave.h
Defines the PlaneWave class: representation of a plane‐wave incident field.

Abstract base for Green's function kernels.
